model_target.reason: Poster layout with exact typography hierarchy and cultural styling benefits from the higher-fidelity model.

intent.goal: Create a digital festival poster with readable on-image text
intent.audience: museum visitors and spring arts attendees

subject.action: moving in a graceful line across the bridge over dark water

scene.background: water planes, distant rooflines, low decorative cloud shapes, controlled lantern reflections
environment_logic: the title field should remain uncluttered in the upper third
lantern reflections should rhythmically echo across the water
architecture and garments should remain period-coherent

composition.framing: vertical composition with a dominant upper title field and midframe procession band
composition.camera_angle: elevated side view with graceful asymmetry
composition.depth_behavior: flattened decorative depth appropriate to print language
composition.negative_space: quiet upper-third field for title and subhead
composition.motion: decorative procession flow from lower-left toward upper-right

lighting.key: soft lantern glow distributed across the bridge
lighting.rim: subtle warm edge on robe silhouettes nearest lantern clusters
lighting.atmosphere: clear evening air with restrained decorative mist shapes
lighting.color_temperature: warm lanterns against cool twilight field

style.texture: woodblock-inspired line rhythm and color separation

copy.text: A Night Procession of Light and Pattern
April 18 • River Arts Hall • Kyoto District
Presented by the Museum of Seasonal Arts

text_overlay.placement: headline in upper third, body copy in lower third, legal line at footer
text_overlay.safe_margins: 8% on all sides with extra breathing room at top

accessibility: clear separation between title and background

safety.copyright: original composition inspired by historical print traits
safety.minors: mixed public crowd acceptable but no focus on minors
policy_notes: cultural framing should remain respectful and non-caricatured
